retrospective.harder_than_needed: The task brief and the immutable pre-impl verification.json commitment (VQ-S1-007) specified two different shapes for the bulk-clear API. The brief said to mirror profileRequestStorage.ts's clearProfileRequestMemos(groupId) exactly — a single function with a '*' sentinel for full-clear. VQ-S1-007 explicitly required two distinct exports instead ('not one function overloaded on an optional groupId argument that a caller could accidentally omit'). I resolved this by following the immutable verification.json commitment (clearPendingDirectInvitesForGroup(groupId) + a separate zero-arg clearAllPendingDirectInvites()), since that is the artifact the post-impl audit will actually check against, and documented the resolution in architecture.json, the source file's header comment, and a new post-impl verification question (VQ-S1-011) so S2/S3 wire the correct distinctly-named export. Also resolved a second, smaller divergence: the brief suggested loadPendingDirectInviteMarkers return Promise<string[]>, but VQ-S1-009 required exactly Promise<Set<string>> as the PendingDirectInviteMarkerSet seam shape — implemented as Set<string>.
